name: moodboard-capture
description: Capture full-page website screenshots and import local images into a repo moodboard folder or a personal inbox.

interface.shortDescription: Save website screenshots or local images into a moodboard library with taste metadata.
interface.longDescription: Captures a desktop full-page screenshot for a URL or imports a local image, saves it into the best available moodboard folder, and appends a lightweight JSONL library record with tags and notes for later browsing or AI reuse.
defaultPrompt: Save https://example.com to my moodboard with tags for soft gradients and editorial layout.
Import /Users/me/Desktop/inspiration.png into the moodboard and note why I like it.
Capture this website into the moodboard folder.
